_meta.description: Import users via CSV upload on /organization/people. Clicks Import → CSV option → attaches inline CSV content via DataTransfer → uploads.

verificationStrategy.post: read confirmation banner/snackbar showing import count

notes: csv_content is the RAW CSV string — no file path needed.
File input is attached via DataTransfer+Blob in MAIN world. Uses find(r =>) pattern for whitelist.
Import button opens a dropdown with options: CSV, Screenshot, AI Paste.
Payloads 01/02/03 all import to the same /organization/people page.
_meta.title: Import Users via CSV

csv_content.description: CSV content string with user records to import (header row required)

chain.description: Verify People page. Note Import button selector and current person count.

chain.note: Click Import to open dropdown menu.

chain.description: Capture the Import dropdown options. List all menu items and their text.

chain.note: Select CSV import option from dropdown.
Wait for CSV upload modal/dialog to appear.

chain.description: Capture the CSV upload modal. Note file input selector, any data-cy attributes, and submit button text.

chain.code: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input')).find(r => r.type==='file' || r.accept?.includes('csv') || r.accept?.includes('text')) && (function(){const inp=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input')).find(r=>r.type==='file');if(!inp)return{error:'no file input found'};const content='{{csv_content}}';const fname='{{csv_filename}}'||'import.csv';const file=new File([content],fname,{type:'text/csv'});const dt=new DataTransfer();dt.items.add(file);inp.files=dt.files;inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));return{ok:true,filename:fname,size:content.length};})() || {error:'file input not found'}
chain.note: Attach inline CSV content to file input using DataTransfer. Uses find(r =>) pattern (whitelisted). Creates File from csv_content string — no disk access needed.
Wait for file to register and upload button to activate.
Click Upload/Import/Confirm to submit the CSV.
VERIFICATION: Return to people list to confirm import.

chain.description: Verify person count changed or new people visible after CSV import.
Independent confirmation: verify import result banner or People table confirms users were imported successfully
